approach: Change the suite-format bar only: add substitutability as the Form 1 / Form 2 selection rule, adopt the psychometric vocabulary, delete every invented margin constant in favour of measuring the judge (cSEM), and name the cut a policy call.
Keep the three survivors of the retired model: count-don't-zero, the strictly-under tie rule, and double-barreled as a named dimension defect.
Freeze the selection rule as additive spec-producer scenarios; do not edit any frozen scenario.
Leave the corpus audit to #282 and the sole-guard scrutiny rule to #280.
blast: doc-only bar change across one reference spec node, one shipped governance skill, one producer README, and additive scenarios in one frozen suite; no code, no CLI, no schema
why: auto-spec: the change is confined to governance prose plus additive scenarios that self-clear, and the superseding model is settled in the issue. The spec gate is self-assertable within leash; the Clearance question on the frozen :171 scenario is charged to the cold judge and escalates to the owner if it fires.

Within the auto-spec leash. Two cold judges read the change; the adversarial one was charged to argue FOR the Clearance floor and overturned the first draft, which modeled the selection rule as post-authoring removal of an authored dimension and so landed inside the frozen 'an already-loseable dimension is left alone' scenario's Given with the opposite outcome. Rewritten to the pre-authoring form the bar prose already specified: a non-substitutable criterion never becomes a dimension, so the frozen implication's antecedent is never satisfied and the scenario is vacuously true rather than falsified — the population of authored dimensions changes, not any snapshot's verdict. On re-attack the adversary could construct no snapshot satisfying both Givens, including the revise case, and returned FLOOR DOES NOT FIRE. Both touched suites are structurally additive (addOnly, zero modified, zero removed) and self-clear. The first judge's structural findings were fixed rather than argued: double-barreled promoted into the structure check in both judge definitions, selection lifted out of the discrimination block into its own peer check sequenced ahead of it, and the split and tie scenarios strengthened to assert an outcome. pnpm verify green.
